home.hero_h1: Binuhay ng Diyos si Jesus mula sa mga patay.
home.hero_h2: May pag-asa para sa lahat na sumusunod sa kanya.
home.series_title: Ang Tunay na Kabutihan ni Jesus
home.series_desc: Tuklasin ang tunay na kabutihan ni Jesus—ang kanyang mga salita, kapangyarihan, habag, at kung ano ang handa at makakaya niyang gawin para sa atin ngayon.
home.welcome_body: Ang Lake Shore Church ay isang komunidad ng mga mananampalataya sa West Loop ng Chicago. Nagtuturo kami ng Kasulatan, sumusunod kay Jesus, at nagbubuo ng komunidad. Malugod na tinatanggap ang lahat—saan man kayo sa inyong pananampalataya.
home.pastor_daily: Nagbabahagi si Pastor Brian ng Kasulatan araw-araw. Sundan kami upang manatiling konektado.
home.ready_next_step: Handa na para sa susunod na hakbang?
home.join_this_sunday: Samahan kami ngayong Linggo 10:00 AM. Malugod na tinatanggap ang lahat.

worship.title: Pagsamba
worship.body: Pinlano ng Diyos ang inyong buhay para sa Kanyang kaluwalhatian at kasiyahan.

grow.title: Lumago
grow.body: Nilikha kayo ng Diyos upang maging tapat na alagad ni Jesucristo.

serve.title: Maglingkod
serve.body: Binigyan kayo ng Diyos ng kaloob upang maglingkod sa Kanyang simbahan at sa ating lungsod.

give.title: Magbigay sa Lake Shore Church
give.subtitle: Suportahan ang aming ministeryo sa West Loop
give.page_desc: Salamat sa inyong mapagbigay na suporta.
give.general_desc: Suportahan ang lingguhang ministeryo at operasyon
give.building_desc: Tulungan kaming magtatag ng tahanan ng simbahan
give.zero_fees: 100% ng inyong regalo ay diretso sa simbahan. Walang bayad sa platform.
give.zeffy_soon: Malapit nang mag-online giving sa Zeffy. Gamitin ang QR o kontakin ang opisina.

prayer.title: Mga Prayer Request
prayer.subtitle: Magpadala ng prayer request. Ipananalangin namin ang bawat isa.
prayer.success: Natanggap ang inyong panalangin. Ipananalangin namin kayo.

visit.title: Magplano ng Pagbisita
visit.subtitle: Gusto naming makita kayo ngayong Linggo.
visit.expect_1: Dumating nang ilang minuto nang maaga—may mga tagasalubong.
visit.expect_2: Sumama sa pagsamba at panalangin kasama ang kongregasyon.
visit.expect_3: Makinig sa pagtuturo ng Salita ng Diyos mula sa Kasulatan.
visit.expect_4: Manatili para makipag-usap—gusto naming makilala kayo.
visit.parking_desc: May street parking at pampublikong transportasyon sa West Loop. Maglaan ng dagdag na oras tuwing Linggo.

language.title_multilingual: Language / 语言 / 言語 / மொழி / Wika

about.intro_1: Ang Lake Shore Church ay isang komunidad ng mga mananampalataya sa West Loop.
about.intro_3: Ang aming pastor ay Craig Brian Larson (Pastor Brian).
about.pastor_bio: Si Pastor Brian ay nagtuturo ng Kasulatan bawat Linggo.

beliefs.belief_1: Ang Biblia ay inspiradong Salita ng Diyos.
beliefs.belief_2: Isang Diyos — Ama, Anak, Espiritu Santo.
beliefs.belief_3: Si Jesucristo ay Anak ng Diyos, namatay at muling nabuhay.
beliefs.belief_4: Binuhay ng Diyos si Jesus. May pag-asa.
beliefs.belief_5: Kaligtasan sa biyaya, pananampalataya, kay Cristo lamang.
beliefs.belief_6: Ang simbahan ay tinawag gumawa ng alagad sa lahat ng bansa.
beliefs.faq_1_a: Teolohiyang nakabatay sa Kasulatan, Assemblies of God.

sermons.page_desc: Mensahe mula sa Salita ng Diyos.

dedication.page_desc: This platform is offered to the glory of God.
dedication.meta_desc: Dedication of the Lake Shore Church digital platform to Jesus Christ, under the direction of the Holy Spirit.
dedication.opening: This website and mobile application are dedicated to the Lord Jesus Christ — to make His gospel known, to serve His church in Chicago's West Loop, and to welcome every nation and tongue. Whatever is true, honorable, and built with excellence here is for Him; whatever falls short is ours to repent of and improve.
dedication.holy_spirit_heading: The Holy Spirit: Director of Technology
dedication.holy_spirit_body: Lake Shore Church affirms that the living God — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — is sovereign over all creation, including every digital system we steward. In a deliberate and professional sense, we name the Holy Spirit as Director of Technology: God Himself guiding wisdom, conscience, security, accessibility, and purpose as we build tools for worship, discipleship, prayer, giving, and outreach. Software does not replace the preached Word, pastoral care, or the gathered congregation; technology serves at the Spirit's direction for the good of the body of Christ and the world He loves.
dedication.steward_body: A designated technology steward maintains this platform operationally — accounts, deployments, databases, and member access — as a servant of the church, accountable to church leadership and to Christ. This role is administrative, not ultimate: the Holy Spirit remains Director; we are coworkers with God (1 Corinthians 3:9). Permissions labeled admin in our systems refer to this human stewardship, not to any claim that a person replaces God's authority.
dedication.built_body: Sermons, events, prayer requests, multilingual pages, and member resources exist so that people may hear that God raised Jesus from the dead and that there is hope for all who follow Him. We pray this work strengthens Lake Shore Church and honors the Assemblies of God commitment to Scripture, the Spirit, and the Great Commission.
dedication.scripture_1: Unless the LORD builds the house, those who build it labor in vain. — Psalm 127:1
dedication.scripture_2: Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men. — Colossians 3:23
dedication.scripture_3: And they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and spoke the word of God with boldness. — Acts 4:31
dedication.closing: Soli Deo gloria — To God alone be the glory.
dedication.platform_note: Lake Shore Church · West Loop · Chicago
